formulas.latex: R \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{A}_{k , i}\right) = \left\{\begin{matrix} & - \omega_{d} \left|a_{k , j} - a_{k , j} y_{k , j}\right| \\ & - \omega_{c} \underset{\begin{matrix}i^{'} \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{s} \\ i^{'} < j\end{matrix}}{\sum} \left(\overset{̄}{y}_{k , i^{'}} - y_{k , i^{'}}\right) - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{u} , \\ & - \omega_{d} \left|d_{k , i} - d_{k , i} y_{k , i}\right| \\ & - \omega_{c} \underset{\begin{matrix}i^{'} \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{s} \\ i^{'} > j\end{matrix}}{\sum} \left(\overset{̄}{y}_{k , i^{'}} - y_{k , i^{'}}\right) - \omega_{p} n_{k , i}^{r} - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{b} , \\ & - \omega_{d} \left(\left|a_{k , j} - a_{k , j} y_{k , j}\right| + \left|d_{k , i} - d_{k , i} y_{k , i}\right|\right) \\ & - \omega_{p} n_{k , i}^{r} - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{s} . \end{matrix}\right

formulas.latex: R \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{A}_{k , i}\right) = \left\{\begin{matrix} & - \omega_{d} \left|a_{k , j} - a_{k , j} y_{k , j}\right| \\ & - \omega_{c} \underset{\begin{matrix}i^{'} \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{s} \\ i^{'} < j\end{matrix}}{\sum} \left(\overset{̄}{y}_{k , i^{'}} - y_{k , i^{'}}\right) - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{u} , \\ & - \omega_{d} \left|d_{k , i} - d_{k , i} y_{k , i}\right| \\ & - \omega_{c} \underset{\begin{matrix}i^{'} \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{s} \\ i^{'} > j\end{matrix}}{\sum} \left(\overset{̄}{y}_{k , i^{'}} - y_{k , i^{'}}\right) - \omega_{p} n_{k , i}^{r} - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{b} , \\ & - \omega_{d} \left(\left|a_{k , j} - a_{k , j} y_{k , j}\right| + \left|d_{k , i} - d_{k , i} y_{k , i}\right|\right) \\ & - \omega_{p} n_{k , i}^{r} - \omega_{e} \alpha_{k , i , j}^{q} E_{i , j}^{q} & & \text{if} \left(i , j\right) \in \mathcal{L}_{s} . \end{matrix}\right

formulas.label: fd49
formulas.latex: \text{Relative time increase} = \frac{\text{Computation time} - \text{Initial computation time}}{\text{Initial computation time}} ,
formulas.mathml:
<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:xoe="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xoe/dtd" xmlns:bk="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/bk/dtd" xmlns:cals="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/cals/dtd" xmlns:ce="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/dtd" xmlns:ja="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:sa="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-aff/dtd" xmlns:sb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-bib/dtd" xmlns:tb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/table/dtd" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xocs="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xocs/dtd" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:prism="http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/basic/2.0/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" altimg="si502.svg" display="block" id="d1e16901">
                                    <mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:mtext>Relative time increase</mml:mtext>
                                       <mml:mo linebreak="goodbreak">=</mml:mo>
                                       <mml:mfrac>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mtext>Computation time</mml:mtext>
                                             <mml:mo linebreak="badbreak">−</mml:mo>

                                    </mml:mrow>
                                 </mml:math>
